name: craftmind

description: CraftMind Disc Golf — AI disc golf companion with 70+ real discs, physics engine, 3 courses, stochastic personalities

description: CraftMind Fishing — 22 personality scripts, A/B testing, autonomous Minecraft fishing. Part of the Lucineer ecosystem.

description: AI Ranch-inspired Minecraft mod — self-evolving bot species that compete, breed, and specialize in farm tasks

description: AI self-improvement for Minecraft bots — autonomous discovery, experiment, and learning

description: AI-powered Minecraft filmmaking studio — AI agents as actors, parallel simulations, Director AI

name: MineWright
description: The first AI that doesn't just play Minecraft — it *understands* Minecraft. Meet Mace MineWright, your AI foreman who coordinates construction crews with personality.
